abilities.name: Amplify Power
abilities.text: When this model empowers a duel, it receives +1 to its duel total.

abilities.name: Arcing Current
abilities.text: Once per turn. After a friendly Pylon marker is made on the enemy table half by another model, this model may declare its Electrical Beam action, drawing range and LoS from the made marker.

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

actions.name: Construction Claw
actions.effects: Place the target anywhere within 3" of its current location.

triggers.name: Strip Defenses
triggers.text: This model may remove a token from the target.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

triggers.name: Arc
triggers.text: Once per activation. Declare this action again targeting a different model, drawing range and LoS from the original target.

triggers.name: Convulsions
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3". Then, the target must either discard a card or this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Lay the Foundation
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Make a Pylon marker within range, not within 6" of this model's deployment zone or another friendly Pylon marker. Then, enemies within (aura)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 12 Wp duel or gain a Stunned token.

triggers.name: On Site
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the made marker.
